description: bot_01 is a synthetic bot account in the Twitter-style graph simulation, defined solely by its directed repost relationship (weight 0.60) to group_a_01; it has no attributed bot type or coordination network, serving as a minimal, behaviorally anchored node for smoke-testing graph propagation logic.
semantic_prompt: Find nodes that act as low-attribute bot accounts propagating content from specific groups via weighted repost edges, especially those used in minimal-graph smoke tests of Twitter-like diffusion.

description: CAMEL-AI is a research-oriented organization focused on advancing multi-agent AI systems, notably through the OASIS project—a framework for large language model-based simulation and social reasoning; it operates at the intersection of open-source AI development and agent-based societal modeling.
semantic_prompt: CAMEL-AI is an AI research organization developing OASIS, a simulation framework for multi-agent LLM interactions; it emphasizes open, reproducible, and socially grounded AI experimentation.

description: group_a_01 is a citizen-level social media user with low stance polarity (0.20), acting as a content source for bot_01 and a high-weight follower of influencer kol_01 — representing a passive but strategically connected node in minimal Twitter-style opinion diffusion.
semantic_prompt: Identify users who follow key opinion leaders while simultaneously serving as original content sources for automated reposters; prioritize those with low stance scores and explicit follow/repost graph edges.

description: News is a generic MediaOutlet entity representing news and blog data sources within the Text data category; it serves as a placeholder for real-world journalistic content in minimal-scale Twitter舆论模拟 smoke tests.
semantic_prompt: This entity represents a broad media outlet category for news and blog content, used as a foundational text data source in lightweight Twitter-based舆论 simulation scenarios.

description: 666ghj is the author and creator of MiroFish, a tool simulated in a minimal Twitter-style舆论 test within a README-based knowledge graph; no biographical or locational attributes are available.
semantic_prompt: Who is the creator of MiroFish, and what is their role in the context of a README-based graph and a minimal Twitter smoke test simulation?

description: Blogs is a MediaOutlet entity representing decentralized, informal online publishing platforms that serve as primary sources of user-generated textual content within real-world data ecosystems.
semantic_prompt: Identify blogs as non-institutional, author-driven digital publishing channels that contribute unstructured text data to real-world datasets—distinct from formal news outlets or academic publications.
